title: ServiceNow benchmarks voice agents on bilingual, code-switched speech
friendlyTitle: ServiceNow tested voice agents with mixed-language speech
summary: ServiceNow published a benchmark for automatic speech recognition on enterprise-style code-switched speech across Spanish-English, French-English, Canadian French-English, and German-English support scenarios.
friendlySummary: ServiceNow published a benchmark for speech recognition when people switch languages during support conversations.
whyItMatters: Voice agents often fail when real customers switch languages mid-sentence. Better evaluation here can improve HR, IT, support, and contact-center systems where transcription errors quickly become wrong tickets or bad answers.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Voice agents need to understand how people really speak, or they can create wrong tickets and poor support answers.
